chapter_title.en: Chapter on a Person Performing Hajj or Tawaf on Behalf of Another or Sharing a Hajj

text: 2972 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «يَدْخُلُ عَلَى اَلْمَيِّتِ فِي قَبْرِهِ اَلصَّلاَةُ وَ اَلصَّوْمُ وَ اَلْحَجُّ وَ اَلصَّدَقَةُ وَ اَلْعِتْقُ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2972 - Imam (as) said:
"Prayer, fasting, Hajj, charity, and emancipation (of slaves) reach the deceased in their grave."
